name: pavo
description: Manifest Anything: data-science-led transcription for real audio, speaker identification, dictionaries, routing, and tasks.

interface.shortDescription: Turn messy audio into auditable team intelligence.
interface.longDescription: Pavo routes Codex to the local pavo CLI for data-science-led transcription workflows: Plaud CLI/MCP access, imported media, real-audio download, manifest inspection, speaker-aware transcription, custom dictionaries, overlap review, routing, and task creation. The plugin is intentionally thin; the CLI/package remains the source of truth.
defaultPrompt: Use Pavo to list my latest Plaud recordings.
Use Pavo to import local audio and run speaker-aware transcription.
Use Pavo doctor to check audio sources, local config, and transcription readiness.
